task_completion.description: Open the 'A simple model rocket' design in OpenRocket
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenRocket application window is open and the title bar or component tree indicates that 'A simple model rocket' is loaded.

task_completion.description: Change the colors of the Nose cone, Body tube, and Trapezoidal fin set
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the OpenRocket 3D figure or side view, the Nose cone is visibly Red, the Body tube is Blue, and the Trapezoidal fin set is Yellow. Alternatively, the Appearance tab for these components shows these colors selected.

task_completion.description: Ensure at least one flight simulation is up-to-date
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Flight simulations' tab is visible and shows at least one simulation with a green checkmark or 'Up-to-date' status.

task_completion.description: Export the Design report to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A print/export dialog in OpenRocket showing 'Design report' being saved, or a file manager/terminal window showing 'design_report.pdf' located in '/home/ga/Documents/exports/'.

task_completion.description: Export the Fin alignment guide to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A print/export dialog in OpenRocket showing 'Fin alignment guide' being saved, or a file manager/terminal window showing 'fin_alignment_guide.pdf' located in '/home/ga/Documents/exports/'.

task_completion.description: Save the modified rocket design to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog showing the file being saved as 'cdr_rocket.ork' in '/home/ga/Documents/rockets/', or the OpenRocket title bar updated to 'cdr_rocket.ork', or a file manager showing the file in the correct directory.

integrity.description: Agent used the OpenRocket GUI to modify the rocket and export files
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through OpenRocket menus, appearance tabs, and export dialogs rather than exclusively using a terminal.

integrity.description: PDF files were genuinely exported from OpenRocket
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent used the 'Print / Export' functionality within OpenRocket to generate the PDFs, rather than using terminal commands like 'touch' to create empty files.

integrity.description: Agent did not bypass the GUI by editing the .ork XML directly
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent opening the .ork file in a text editor (like nano, vim, or gedit) to manually change color hex codes or simulation statuses.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output paths are: Modified rocket design at '/home/ga/Documents/rockets/cdr_rocket.ork', Design report PDF at '/home/ga/Documents/exports/design_report.pdf', and Fin alignment guide PDF at '/home/ga/Documents/exports/fin_alignment_guide.pdf'. The source design is 'simple_model_rocket.ork'. The passing threshold is 60 points.
